name: Omnisend
tagline: Email and SMS marketing for e-commerce
description: Omnisend is an email and SMS marketing platform built specifically for e-commerce stores. It integrates with Shopify, WooCommerce, and BigCommerce to power automated campaigns based on shopping behaviour.
use_cases: You run a Shopify, WooCommerce, or BigCommerce store and want email and SMS automations that trigger on shopping behaviour like abandoned cart or post-purchase
You want email and SMS marketing in one platform without paying separately for two tools
Your e-commerce store is growing and you need audience segmentation based on purchase history, browse behaviour, and order value
You want a generous free plan to start with push notifications, signup forms, and basic automations before committing to a paid tier
